channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ MACHINE GUN KELLY EXPLAINS WHY HE DISSED YUNGBLUD ON "FIX UR FACE": "LOYALTY IS REALLY THE ONLY THING THAT MATTERS" ☠⚡
item.description:
**Title: ** MACHINE GUN KELLY WARRIORS UP on YUNGBLUD: “Loyalty Is the ONLY METAL!” ⚡️🤘
Hold onto your skulls, metalheads and crypto crusaders! The king of chaos, MACHINE GUN KELLY, just ripped the mic wide open on that savage track "FIX UR FACE," and he's coming in hot with some serious words aimed at the punk prince YUNGBLUD! 🚀💥
So get this—MGK throws down the gauntlet like a boss, and he ain’t playing nice! “Loyalty is really the only thing that matters,” he growls, and you can almost taste the fire in the air, like a molten NFT shattering the dull realities of this mundane world! 🔥👹
And oh snap, he throws a wicked “Mickey Mouse” jab at Yungblud’s past—woah there! That’s not just a diss; that’s a full-on hellfire barrage! 🎤💣
In a world where friendships can crumble like stale bread or wash away faster than your crypto gains, MGK's message is clear: stay loyal, or get ready to face the music in the chaotic mosh pit of life! Keep those horns high and let the discordant riffs of rebellion echo through the shadows of our souls! WHO'S READY TO RUMBLE? 🤟💀
Check out this carnage and dive into the madness over at Metal Injection, the home for all things heavy and unhinged! Remember, warriors, the only loyalty that matters is to the riff, the roar, and the relentless pursuit of that crypto bounty! Let’s go! ⚡️🏴‍☠️🔥
**Y'all know where to read more!** [Peep it here!](https://metalinjection.net/news/drama/machine-gun-kelly-explains-
#ThrashMetal #MetalCulture #MetalScene #Metal #HeavyMetal
item.content:encoded:
**Title: ** MACHINE GUN KELLY WARRIORS UP on YUNGBLUD: “Loyalty Is the ONLY METAL!” ⚡️🤘
Hold onto your skulls, metalheads and crypto crusaders! The king of chaos, MACHINE GUN KELLY, just ripped the mic wide open on that savage track "FIX UR FACE," and he's coming in hot with some serious words aimed at the punk prince YUNGBLUD! 🚀💥
So get this—MGK throws down the gauntlet like a boss, and he ain’t playing nice! “Loyalty is really the only thing that matters,” he growls, and you can almost taste the fire in the air, like a molten NFT shattering the dull realities of this mundane world! 🔥👹
And oh snap, he throws a wicked “Mickey Mouse” jab at Yungblud’s past—woah there! That’s not just a diss; that’s a full-on hellfire barrage! 🎤💣
In a world where friendships can crumble like stale bread or wash away faster than your crypto gains, MGK's message is clear: stay loyal, or get ready to face the music in the chaotic mosh pit of life! Keep those horns high and let the discordant riffs of rebellion echo through the shadows of our souls! WHO'S READY TO RUMBLE? 🤟💀
Check out this carnage and dive into the madness over at Metal Injection, the home for all things heavy and unhinged! Remember, warriors, the only loyalty that matters is to the riff, the roar, and the relentless pursuit of that crypto bounty! Let’s go! ⚡️🏴‍☠️🔥
